reviews.content: Fantastic

These Active 500 SQR sunglasses are the perfect middle ground between high-performance athletic eyewear and everyday style. The Category 3 lenses provide excellent protection in strong sunlight, making them ideal for everything from hiking to intense outdoor sports. What stands out most is the "SQR" rectangular frame—it offers a modern look that doesn't feel out of place when you're off the field. They are incredibly lightweight and stay secure even when you're moving fast, thanks to the grippy temple tips. If you need one pair of sunglasses that can handle a morning workout and a casual afternoon out, these are it.
Best sunglass
Fait le taf
Looks good, classic, comfortable

Active 500 SQR rectangular sunglasses are stylish, lightweight, and comfortable for daily use. The Category 3 lenses provide good sun protection and reduce glare effectively. Great for outdoor activities, though color options are limited.
Lunettes solaire très sympa

Not Taiwan-made as mentioned in the website.

Occhiali da sole molto pratici e leggeri. Li ho trovati comodi fin dal primo utilizzo e proteggono bene dal sole anche in giornate molto luminose. Il design è semplice ma moderno, quindi si abbinano facilmente a qualsiasi outfit
